codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. The worker added two new endpoints (`/onchain/search/pools` and `/onchain/pools/trending_search`) with proper exact-match ranking semantics, network filtering, subset handling, deterministic invalid-candidate behavior, and page-based pagination. All feature requirements from the feature description and fulfills assertions are met.

summary: The onchain pool search and trending-search endpoints are correctly implemented with all required semantics. The scoring system properly prioritizes exact matches (address: 10k, name: 9k, symbol: 8k) before partial matches. Network filtering validates the network exists and returns a 400 error for unknown networks. The trending-search subset handling correctly tracks duplicates and invalid addresses in `ignored_candidates`. Pagination works correctly with proper meta fields. Tests in `tests/app.test.ts` comprehensively verify all functionality including exact vs partial ordering, network filtering, subset handling with duplicate/invalid candidates, and page boundaries.
